classification.reason: The customer is inquiring about the refund policy, which is a general billing inquiry.

email.subject: Refund Policy Inquiry
email.body: Dear Customer, thank you for reaching out. Unfortunately, I don't have specific details on your order status at this moment. Our refund policy is currently not available in my resources. I recommend checking our website or contacting us for more detailed information. I'm here to help with any further questions.
